title: Medlife Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Medlife Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Medlife Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
